category_sources: Official README describes facad as a modern colorful directory listing / ls alternative.
source_facts.description says facad is a modern, colorful directory listing tool for the command line.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is `facad`; official GitHub README heading is `facad`.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and includes features, installation, and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides the official repository; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README topics and usage identify files, terminal, command-line, and ls behavior.
